div.p: Bitmap Approach ✓ 100% detection rate ✓ Explicit state per block ✓ Can enumerate all leaks ✗ 1 bit overhead per block ✗ O(chunks) index lookup
Sentinel Approach ✓ Zero memory overhead ✓ O(1) check (just read ptr) ✓ Simple implementation ✗ ~99% detection (false negative if user writes sentinel value)
ERROR: Double-free detected! Block is already FREE in bitmap Cannot free what is not allocated
ERROR: Double-free detected! Block already contains SENTINEL This block was already freed!
